name: @camera.ui/camera-ui-onvif
description: ONVIF integration for camera.ui. Provides camera discovery, PTZ control, and motion, object, audio and face events via ONVIF.
author: seydx (https://github.com/cameraui/plugins)

scripts.build: rimraf dist && npm run build:onvif && tsc
scripts.bundle: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run build && cui bundle
scripts.bundle:dev: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run build && cross-env MODE=development cui bundle
scripts.prepublishOnly:
node -e "if(!process.env.SAFE_PUBLISH){console.error('Error: Please use @camera.ui/cli to publish the plugin:
  npm run publish:alpha
  npm run publish:beta
  npm run publish:latest
');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.publish:alpha: npm i --save --force && npm run bundle && cui publish --alpha
scripts.publish:beta: npm i --save --force && npm run bundle && cui publish --beta
scripts.publish:latest: npm i --save --force && npm run bundle && cui publish --latest
